title: 中日新聞杯の後に・最後の大舞台へ

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I believed in myself, gave it my all... and took first
place! First place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was weak, but I had people who pushed and
pulled me along until I finally gave chase. I ran
and ran and ran...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And now, finally, I'm standing here on my own!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can confidently compete with everyone at the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I won't run away anymore. I won't betray
everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I will shine as the star of the Arima Kinen!
